problem: Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it?
hypothesis: Combining Polymer crosslinking under specific stimulus with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 31 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
